title: URGENT: Cyclone Landfall Expected in 12 Hours
message: Category 4 cyclone expected to hit Odisha coast. All residents within 10km of coastline must evacuate immediately. Report to nearest shelter.

title: Flood Water Rising in Guwahati
message: Water levels in Brahmaputra crossing danger mark. Low-lying areas of Guwahati must relocate to higher ground. Relief camps set up at: Gandhi Maidan, IIT Guwahati campus.

title: Gas Leak Containment Update
message: Toxic gas leak at Vizag industrial plant partially contained. Evacuation zone reduced to 3km radius. Maintain masks. Medical camps at: King George Hospital, Andhra University.

title: Volunteer Deployment Call - Kerala Floods
message: Urgent need for 100+ volunteers with swimming/boating skills in Wayanad district. Report to Kalpetta town hall by 6 AM tomorrow. Transport arranged from Kozhikode.

title: Shelter Locations Updated - Earthquake Area
message: New temporary shelters established at: Bhuj Stadium, Gandhi School, Anjar Community Center. Free food and medical aid available 24/7.

title: Dengue Prevention Drive - Chennai
message: Fumigation drive starting tomorrow in T. Nagar, Anna Nagar, and Velachery areas. Keep windows closed between 6-8 AM. Free dengue testing at all government hospitals.

title: Road Cleared - Shimla Landslide
message: One lane of NH-5 cleared for emergency vehicles only. Civilian traffic still restricted. Alternative route via Kalka-Shimla railway operational.

title: SOS: Family Trapped on Rooftop
message: Family of 6 including 2 children stranded on rooftop at coordinates 26.1502, 91.7298. Need immediate boat rescue. Contact Assam SDRF.
